name: 2-Day Tour: Rabat → Meknes → Volubilis → Fes

seo.title: 2-Day Rabat → Fes Tour — Meknes & Volubilis | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 2-day tour from Rabat to Fes: Meknes (Bab Mansour, royal stables), Moulay Idriss (holy city), Roman ruins of Volubilis (UNESCO), arrival in Fes. Guide included.

hero.tagline: Rabat → Meknes → Volubilis → Fes: the imperial cities of the north

intro: This 2-day tour connects Rabat to Fes through two major historical stops: Meknes, Moulay Ismail's imperial city with its imposing Bab Mansour gate and royal stables, and Volubilis, the ancient Roman city listed as a UNESCO World Heritage site. An ideal itinerary to discover northern Morocco between Roman history and Sherifian splendour.
